# External debt, total (current US$) over time by country

| Country | 2016 | 2017 | 2018 | 2019 | 2020 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Vietnam | 79,000,000,000 | 92,000,000,000 | 105,000,000,000 | 112,000,000,000 | 119,000,000,000 |
| Kenya | 48,000,000,000 | 55,000,000,000 | 62,000,000,000 | 69,000,000,000 | 74,000,000,000 |
| Peru | 69,000,000,000 | 73,000,000,000 | 78,000,000,000 | 82,000,000,000 | 88,000,000,000 |
| Morocco | 47,000,000,000 | 50,000,000,000 | 53,000,000,000 | 56,000,000,000 | 60,000,000,000 |
| Jordan | 30,000,000,000 | 32,000,000,000 | 34,000,000,000 | 36,000,000,000 | 39,000,000,000 |
| Sri Lanka | 46,000,000,000 | 49,000,000,000 | 52,000,000,000 | 55,000,000,000 | 57,000,000,000 |
